summary: Comprehensive testing of Dead Signal Phase 1 MVP completed successfully. All core features working excellently including authentication, real-time WebSocket integration, AI narrative generation via Gemini 2.5 Flash, and live server monitoring. Backend APIs 96% functional, frontend 100% functional with perfect dark tactical military theme.

minor_bugs.issue: GET request returns 405 Method Not Allowed instead of 401 Unauthorized
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - endpoint correctly requires POST but error code inconsistent

expected_behaviors.behavior: Pterodactyl API integration working - server shows OFFLINE state as expected
expected_behaviors.impact: Expected behavior - server is currently offline

expected_behaviors.behavior: WebSocket consumer connected and providing real-time stats

passed_tests: Admin login (admin@deadsignal.com / DeadSignal2024!) redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows LIVE indicator in header (WebSocket connected)
Dashboard shows OFFLINE indicator in header (server currently down)
Server Status panel shows real data: 'Lonely Island', CPU %, RAM, Disk with progress bars
Power controls (Start, Stop, Restart, Kill) visible and clickable for admin
Event Feed panel renders with events and proper styling
AI Narrative Dispatch panel with all 5 buttons functional
Radio Report generates AI narration via Gemini 2.5 Flash successfully
Dawn Sitrep, Nightfall Warning, Noon Report, Narrate Latest buttons working
Console tab shows Command Terminal with LIVE FEED toggle and command input
Console command input functional - 'help' command sent successfully
Tactical Map tab shows placeholder grid with markers and coordinates
Players tab shows Player Roster with online count (0 currently)
Admin tab shows File System and Backups panels with SCAN buttons functional
File System SCAN button working
Backups SCAN button working
User dropdown with Disconnect (logout) works correctly
All 5 tabs render correctly: Overview, Console, Tactical Map, Players, Admin
Backend API: GET /api/server/live-stats returns real-time stats from Pterodactyl WS
Backend API: GET /api/players returns player tracking data
Backend API: GET /api/server/console-log returns buffered console lines
Backend API: POST /api/narrative/radio-report generates Gemini-powered report
Backend API: POST /api/narrative/ambient?time_of_day=dawn generates dawn dispatch
Authentication flow with JWT and httpOnly cookies working perfectly
WebSocket integration providing live updates
Pterodactyl WebSocket consumer connected and streaming data
AI narrator generating atmospheric content with Gemini 2.5 Flash
Dark tactical military theme implemented perfectly
Typewriter effect for AI transmissions working beautifully
Responsive design and smooth UI interactions
